'''Cadgel Meadows''' was a stretch of open grassland on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], and the site of the world's largest civilian [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. It was located close to [[Half-Axe Pass]].

==History==
After the [[Cleansing of New Plympto|Battle of Half-Axe Pass]], the area was seized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who captured all refugees trying to flee through the region. The spaceport was shut down by the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]], and all [[Starship/Legends|starships]] docked there were grounded. Later, in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Bomo Greenbark]] and [[Dass Jennir]] entered Cadgel Meadows and infiltrated the spaceport, stowing away on the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Uhumele]]'' prior to the mass lift-off of all starships fleeing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] aggression. The region, along with all of New Plympto, was destroyed when a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bioweapon razed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] {{1st}}
